Notice Of Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS SAFEWAY, INC., WHELAN SECURITY OF CALIFORNIA, INC. DBA GARDAWORLD's Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is timely filed but unopposed. Request to deem admissions admitted is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Barbara Zuniga; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/BAZ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs? Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS SAFEWAY, INC., AND WHELAN SECURITY OF CALIFORNIA, INC. DBA GARDAWORLD's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is timely filed but unopposed. Plaintiff is to respond to form interrogatories and produce documents within 15 days of service of order. Request for sanctions in the amount of $750 is granted. Sanctions are to be paid to defense counsel also within 15 days of service of order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Barbara Zuniga; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/BAZ)
